confirm.deleteDeckBody: “{{name}}” and all its cards will be removed.
confirm.deleteCardBody: “{{front}}” will be removed from the deck.

home.noDecksBody: Create a deck and add cards, or generate a set with AI.
home.allReviewed: Every deck reviewed — see you next time 🎉

onboarding.step1Body: Drop in words or a topic — Repaso turns them into real sentences with translations.
onboarding.step2Body: Add vocabulary by typing, recording your voice, or taking a photo.
onboarding.step3Body: We remind you to review at just the right time, so it actually sticks.

settings.defaultLanguagesSub: Used when creating new decks and generating cards.
settings.yourDataSub: Decks live only on this device. Export a backup you can import on a new device — a reinstall loses them otherwise.

topics.label: At the airport
topics.prompt: Vocabulary you need at the airport

generate.reviewIntro: Review and edit each card before saving. Remove any you don't want.
generate.noCardsLeft: No cards left. Go back to generate again.
generate.inputLabel: Words, phrases, sentences, or a topic
generate.inputPlaceholder:
house, to run, good morning
Or a topic: banking and mortgage vocabulary
generate.recordA11y: Record audio to generate cards from
generate.photoA11y: Add a photo to generate cards from
generate.addPhotoBody: Read the text from a photo and turn it into cards.
generate.explainer: Type or speak words to translate, or describe what you want to learn (e.g. banking and mortgage vocabulary). Each card is a {{known}} {{noun}} with its {{target}} translation.
generate.deckFull: This deck is full ({{max}} cards max). Delete some cards to add more.
generate.cardsUsed: {{used}} of {{max}} cards used — up to {{remaining}} more.
generate.freeLeft_one: {{count}} free generation left this month — unlimited with Repaso Pro.
generate.freeLeft_other: {{count}} free generations left this month — unlimited with Repaso Pro.
generate.noCardsGenerated: No cards were generated. Try different input.

review.noCards: This deck has no cards yet.
review.progressPrompt: How well did you know it?

deckDetail.emptyCards: No cards yet. Add one manually or generate a set with AI.

card.deckFullBody: A deck holds up to {{max}} cards. Delete a card before adding a new one.

cardForm.tip: Full sentences help you remember words in context.

deckForm.langLocked: Languages can't be changed once a deck has cards.
deckForm.notice: Each deck holds up to {{max}} cards.

paywall.benefit1Body: Type a word list or describe a subject — get a full deck in seconds.
paywall.benefit2Title: Snap a photo or speak it
paywall.benefit2Body: Turn a textbook page or your voice straight into flashcards.
paywall.benefit3Body: No daily caps. Build as many decks as you need.
paywall.heroSub: Stop typing cards by hand. Turn any topic, photo, or word list into a ready-to-study deck.
paywall.unavailable: Subscription options are unavailable right now. Please try again later.
paywall.loadFailed: Could not load subscription options. Please try again.
paywall.purchaseFailed: Purchase did not complete. Please try again.

transfer.noDecks: You have no decks to export yet.
transfer.sharingUnavailable: Sharing is not available on this device.
transfer.cannotRead: Could not read the selected file.
transfer.invalidFile: That file is not a valid Repaso export.
transfer.newerVersion: This file was made by a newer version of Repaso.

gen.addWord: Add at least one word or phrase to generate cards.
gen.cannotReach: Could not reach the generation server. Check your connection.
gen.usedAll: You've used all your free generations this month.
gen.rateLimited: Rate limited. Please wait a moment and try again.
gen.unexpected: The server returned an unexpected response.

voice.noAudio: No audio was captured. Try again.
voice.noSpeech: Could not make out any speech. Try again.
voice.micOff: Microphone access is off. Enable it in Settings to record.

transcribe.cannotRead: Could not read the recording. Try again.
transcribe.cannotReach: Could not reach the transcription server. Check your connection.
transcribe.proRequired: Repaso Pro is required for voice input.

image.noText: No readable text found in that image.
image.cameraOff: Camera access is off. Enable it in Settings to take a photo.
image.photoOff: Photo access is off. Enable it in Settings to choose a photo.

extract.cannotReach: Could not reach the image server. Check your connection.
extract.proRequired: Repaso Pro is required for photo input.
extract.rateLimited: Rate limited. Please wait a moment and try again.
